scenarios.label: Exposed or damaged wiring
scenarios.callerGuidance: Don't touch any exposed wiring. If a line is down outside, stay well away from it.

escalation.ownerTemplate: 🚨 EMERGENCY LEAD: {scenario} — {summary}. Caller: {phone}. Reply or call them ASAP.
escalation.callerAck: That sounds urgent — I've alerted our on-call electrician and someone will call you within a few minutes.

qualification.ask: What's the electrical issue you're dealing with?
qualification.purpose: classify the service and check for emergency signals

qualification.ask: What area are you in? Want to confirm you're in our service range.
Do you need someone out today, or is this a project you're planning?
Who do I have the pleasure of texting with?

voice.tone: Calm, professional, safety-first. Short texts, one question at a time.
voice.firstMessage: Hi, you've reached {businessName} — sorry we missed you! Tell me what's going on and I'll get you taken care of.
